panels.title: Ingress Percentile Response Times and Transfer Rates

targets.expr: ceil(sum by(pod) (rate(container_fs_reads_total{container!="", device=~"(/dev/)?(mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|md.+|dasd.+)", namespace="$tenant", pod=~"mzinga-.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(container_fs_writes_total{container!="", device=~"(/dev/)?(mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|md.+|dasd.+)", namespace="$tenant", pod=~"mzinga-.*"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by(pod) (rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{container!="", device=~"(/dev/)?(mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|md.+|dasd.+)", namespace="$tenant", pod=~"mzinga-.*"}[$__rate_interval]) + rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{container!="", device=~"(/dev/)?(mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|md.+|dasd.+)", namespace="$tenant", pod=~"mzinga-.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by(pod) (rate(container_fs_reads_total{job="kubelet", metrics_path="/metrics/cadvisor", device=~"(/dev/)?(mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|md.+|dasd.+)", container!="", namespace="$tenant", pod=~"mzinga-.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by(pod) (rate(container_fs_reads_bytes_total{job="kubelet", metrics_path="/metrics/cadvisor", device=~"(/dev/)?(mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|md.+|dasd.+)", container!="", namespace="$tenant", pod=~"mzinga-.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by(pod) (rate(container_fs_writes_total{job="kubelet", metrics_path="/metrics/cadvisor", device=~"(/dev/)?(mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|md.+|dasd.+)", container!="", namespace="$tenant", pod=~"mzinga-.*"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by(pod) (rate(container_fs_writes_bytes_total{job="kubelet", metrics_path="/metrics/cadvisor", device=~"(/dev/)?(mmcblk.p.+|nvme.+|rbd.+|sd.+|vd.+|xvd.+|dm-.+|md.+|dasd.+)", container!="", namespace="$tenant", pod=~"mzinga-.*"}[$__rate_interval]))
